aquifer.aqu.description: This file contains the general physical and chemical aquifer properties.

columns.name: aqu_init
columns.description: Pointer to the aquifer initialization file

columns.name: dep_bot
columns.description: Depth from mid-slope surface to bottom of aquifer

columns.name: dep_wt
columns.description: Depth from mid-slope surface to initial water table

columns.name: flo_dist
columns.description: Average flow distance to stream or object

columns.name: flo_max
columns.description: Baseflow rate at which all streams linked to an aquifer receive groundwater flow

columns.name: alpha_bf
columns.description: Alpha factor for groundwater recession curve

columns.name: hl_no3
columns.description: Half-life of NO3-N in the aquifer

columns.name: flo_min
columns.description: Threshold depth from surface to water table for groundwater flow to occur

columns.name: revap_min
columns.description: Threshold depth from surface to water table for revap to occur

columns.name: swift_out
columns.description: Writing of input file for SWIFT

columns.name: lapse
columns.description: Precipitation and temperature lapse rate control

parameters.bsn.metadata_structure_raw: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

columns.name: sw_init
columns.description: Initial soil water storage expressed as a fraction of field capacity water content

columns.name: adj_pkrt
columns.description: Peak rate adjustment factor for sediment routing in the subbasin (tributary channels)

columns.name: prf
columns.description: Peak rate adjustment factor for sediment routing in the main channel

columns.name: orgn_min
columns.description: Rate factor for humus mineralization of active organic nutrients (N and P)

columns.name: msk_co1
columns.description: Coefficient to control the impact of the storage time constant for normal flow on the overall storage time constant for the channel

columns.name: msk_co2
columns.description: Coefficient to control the impact of the storage time constant for low flow on the overall storage time constant for the channel

columns.name: msk_x
columns.description: Weighting factor control relative importance of inflow rate and outflow rate in determining storage on reach

columns.name: nperco_lchtile
columns.description: Nitrogen concentration coefficient for tile flow and leaching from bottom layer

columns.name: adj_uhyd
columns.description: Adjustment factor for subdaily unit hydrograph basetime

columns.name: cn_froz
columns.description: Parameter for frozen soil adjustment on infiltration/runoff

columns.name: dorm_hr
columns.description: Time threshold used to define dormancy

columns.name: urb_init_abst
columns.description: Maximum initial abstraction for urban areas

columns.name: uhyd_alpha
columns.description: Alpha coefficient for gamma function unit hydrograph

columns.name: cov_mgt
columns.description: Scaling parameter for cover and management factor for overland flow erosion

columns.name: co2
columns.description: CO2 concentration at start of simulation

columns.name: ptlp_solp

columns.name: alg_n

columns.name: alg_o2_prod

columns.name: alg_o2_resp
columns.description: Oxygen uptake rate per unit of algae respiration

columns.name: o2_nh3n
columns.description: Oxygen uptake rate per unit of NH3-N oxidation

columns.name: o2_no2n

columns.name: alg_grow

columns.name: const_p

columns.name: lt_nonalg
columns.description: Non-algal portion of the light extinction coefficient

atmo.cli.description: This file contains observed atmospheric deposition data.
atmo.cli.metadata_structure_raw: Non-standard - first line is reserved for user comments. The second line contains the column headers for the third line, which lists basic information about the atmospheric deposition stations.

columns.name: num_sta
columns.description: Number of stations included in the file

columns.name: timestep
columns.description: Time step of the atmospheric deposition data

columns.name: mo_init
columns.description: First month data is available for (0 for yearly and average annual data)

columns.name: yr_init
columns.description: First year data is available for (0 for average annual data)

columns.name: num_aa
columns.description: Number of months or years data is available for

weather-wgn.cli.description: This file contains weather generator data to be used for a SWAT+ setup.
weather-wgn.cli.metadata_structure_raw: Non-standard - second line for each weather generator station contains the headers for the following 12 lines, which list the weather generator data for each month of the year. An overview of the weather generator data variables is given in the second table below.

columns.name: yrs_pcp
columns.description: Number of years of maximum monthly 0.5 h rainfall data used to define values for pcp_hhr

lum.dtl.description: This file contains land use and management decision tables.
lum.dtl.metadata_structure_raw: Non-standard - first line is reserved for a title. The second line in the file specifies the total number of decision tables included in the file.

management.sch.description: This file is used to schedule management operations.
management.sch.metadata_structure_raw: Non-standard - first line for each management schedule specifies the name of the schedule and the number of scheduled and/or automatic operations. When using scheduled operations, it is followed by one line per operation listing operation-specific data.
